overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a lone female character in a flowing coat walking through a misty coastal landscape at night. The character traverses from a grassy cliff overlooking a foggy ocean, through a narrow rocky valley with weathered stone formations, toward a mysterious warm light source glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal cliff overlooking foggy ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy cliff edge with hair and coat blowing in the wind, overlooking the misty ocean

entered.detail: calm foggy sea stretching to the horizon under dark blue sky
tall grass-covered cliff ledge where the character stands and walks
jagged rocky headland extending into the misty water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy coastal cliff at night, with the foggy ocean visible to the left and jagged rock formations to the right. The wind blows through the tall grass and the character's hair as they move steadily along the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky valley with weathered stone formations

events.description: character turns away from the coastal cliff and enters the inland rocky valley terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding dirt path through the misty valley between steep rock walls

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock faces forming a narrow passage
ancient-looking stone structures partially obscured by fog
narrow winding trail through the valley floor

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the coast, the character enters a narrow rocky valley with steep walls on either side. The ground transitions to a dirt path winding through sparse vegetation and weathered stone formations visible through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty valley path approaching a distant light source

events.description: warm torch light becomes visible in the distant fog, growing brighter as the character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking toward the mysterious distant light source that glows warmly through the blue mist

entered.detail: warm orange light source flickering in the fog, appearing to be held by a figure in the distance
clusters of pale luminescent flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the valley, a warm torch light emerges from the fog ahead, creating a focal point in the blue darkness. White wildflowers line the path on the right as the character approaches the mysterious light source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a windswept coastal cliff into a narrow, fog-shrouded valley that culminates in the discovery of a mysterious light. It begins with the character walking along a grassy precipice at night, where the wind whips through the vegetation and hair against a backdrop of a foggy ocean and jagged rocks. As the character turns away from the coast, the open landscape tightens into a rocky valley with steep walls and a winding dirt path cutting through weathered stone formations. The scene then shifts as the blue darkness of the valley is pierced by a warm torch light emerging from the thick mist ahead. Finally, the camera follows the character past clusters of white wildflowers lining the path as they draw closer to the glowing focal point.
